Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_SQUARE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_SQUARE: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_square#Discussion)

The effect represents a square force effect.
